\tzpentry{ID5812}{North Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5812 introduces North Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{\text{north}} = +\int_{\mathcal{V}_N} \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, d^3x = -\mathcal{H}_{\text{south}} \end{equation}
